Minimum lag across local and spatial history features.
Should be 1 for short-term nowcasting and >= 24 for long-term forecasting.
Spatial lags may include 6h and 12h in the 24h-ahead setting to model cross-city transport progression.
Should be empty for Long-term Forecasting (Lag 24h). Short-term nowcasting intentionally allows local lag 1-3h.
Expected in Long-term Forecasting (Lag 24h) after spatial-lag tuning; these features are cross-station transport signals.
